question: Write a thread-safe in-memory message queue with enqueue, dequeue, and peek. Show in TypeScript, Python, and Go.
Write a priority queue (min-heap) with push and pop. Show in TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust.
Write a task scheduler that runs registered callbacks at specified intervals. Show in TypeScript, Python, and Go.
Write consistent hashing to distribute keys across N nodes. Show in TypeScript and Python.
Write a CRON expression parser that returns the next run time. Show in TypeScript and Python.
